questions.question: What inputs are required so that the combinational logic circuit in a washing machine triggers the alarm at output Y?

The following AND-NOT circuit is used as a part of a drive spindle motor. The circuit is designed such that the motor turns ON when Drive= 1. Determine the input conditions necessary to turn ON the motor.
Which of the following statements best describes the working of the following circuit?

answers.a: A HIGH output occurs when all three inputs are LOW.
answers.b: A HIGH output occurs when even a single input is LOW.
answers.c: A HIGH output occurs when all three inputs are HIGH.
answers.d: Options A and B are TRUE.

State the output that is necessary to activate the Heater.
